query:
SELECT u.id,
                  u.username,
                  pv.display_name AS "display_name!",
                  pv.bio,
                  pv.website_url,
                  u.created_at,
                  pv.created_at AS "updated_at!"
           FROM users u
           JOIN LATERAL (
               SELECT display_name, bio, website_url, created_at
               FROM user_profile_versions
               WHERE user_id = u.id
               ORDER BY created_at DESC
               LIMIT 1
           ) pv ON TRUE
           WHERE u.id = $1
